root_goal: Eval Framework 재구축: /harness 비판 3대 문제 해결 후 정직한 eval로 CTX 개선 수렴
original_goal: G1/G2에 맞는 적절한 평가 방법 구축 + 수렴까지 개선 (eval gaming 없이)

harness_critique.critical_1: G1 scoring is keyword bingo, not understanding
harness_critique.critical_2: G1 downstream feeds oracle context, never calls CTX retrieve()
harness_critique.critical_3: G1 score 0.308→0.705 came from changing eval, not system
harness_critique.fix_2: G1 must call CTX adaptive_trigger.retrieve() for context
harness_critique.fix_3: Add random retrieval baseline (CTX vs random files)
